title: `_pypyjson.raw_encode_basestring_ascii` segfaults
author: devdanzin
body:
It's possible to segfault PyPy by calling `_pypyjson.raw_encode_basestring_ascii` with an invalid value:

```python
import _pypyjson
_pypyjson.raw_encode_basestring_ascii(b'\xa2\xf1')
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```

```
Python 3.10.14 (39dc8d3c85a7, Aug 27 2024, 14:32:27)
[PyPy 7.3.17 with GCC 10.2.1 20210130 (Red Hat 10.2.1-11)] on linux
```

Found using fusil by @vstinner.

comments.author: mattip
comments.body: Fixed in a608a540070, now raises TypeError as it should. Thanks for the report
